1.name: Silence of Death
1.description: Make the area around you completely silent
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 139
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 175
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 203

1.name: Blood Essence
1.description: (V20DA): Draw out the heart's blood of an exsanguinated and weakened target
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 244

1.name: Blood Tempering
1.description: (V20DA): Preserves items by infusing them with blood
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 248

2.name: Scorpion's Touch
2.description: Create a contact poison that greatly debilitates a victim physically
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 175
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 203

2.name: (Sorcerer) Scorpion's Curse
2.description: Place a ward on a solid surface that activates the Warrior power when touched

2.name: (Vizier) Ishtar's Touch
2.description: Create a contact poison that leaves the target inebriated

2.name: Truth of Blood
2.description: Taste the blood of a target to learn if it has lied
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 248

2.name: Weakness
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 139

3.name: Dagon's Call
3.description: Cause harm from afar to a person who you have touched within the last hour
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 176
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 204

3.name: Cleanse in Blood
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 249

3.name: Disease
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 140

4.name: Baal's Caress
4.description: Create a poison that can be coated on weapons to make them more dangerous
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 176
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 204

4.name: Ripples of the Heart
4.description: Leave emotions in the blood of a mortal that will be transmitted to any vampire that feeds from them
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 249
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 206

4.name: Blood Agony
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 140

5.name: Taste of Death
5.description: (Revised): Spit acidic blood at a target
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 140
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 176
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 205
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 247

5.name: Taste of Bliss
5.description: Exhale red mist against a target that draws away Willpower

5.name: Blood Sweat
5.description: Force a target to profusely sweat blood and dwell on horrible things they've done
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 249
The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 140
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 205

5.name: Quicken the Mortal's Blood
5.description: (V20DA): Receive two blood points for each point drained
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 246

6.name: [6] Blood Awakening
6.description: Scan the blood you ingest for memories Blood Sweat : Force a target to profusely sweat blood and dwell on horrible things they've done Cleansing of Influence ( CB:AS1 ) : Remove non-blood based influences such as Dominate Deed the Heart's Desire : Cut yourself off from all sounds and distractions in order to meditate or cause a victim to become insane Purification : Cleanse an individual of mental and emotional influences over them, even curses and other magical effects Quicken the Mortal's Blood (Revised): Receive two blood points for each point drained Rapturous Touch : Drink blood through the skin Ripples of the Heart : Leave emotions in the blood of a mortal that will be transmitted to any vampire that feeds from them Selective Silence : As Silence of Death , except you can designate certain people to be able to make sound Thin Blood : Make a vampire unable to heal their wounds with vitae Taste of Death (V20DA): Spit acidic blood at a target

6.name: Cleansed in Blood
6.description: Blood (V20DA): Cleanse an individual of mental and emotional influences over them, even curses and other magical effects Dagon's Call : Cause harm from afar to the mind a person who you have touched within the last hour
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 67

6.name: Cleansing of Influence
6.description: ( CB:AS1 ) : Remove non-blood based influences such as Dominate

6.name: Deed the Heart's Desire
6.description: Cut yourself off from all sounds and distractions in order to meditate or cause a victim to become insane
references: Caine's Chosen: The Black Hand Pg. 75

6.name: Purification
6.description: Cleanse an individual of mental and emotional influences over them, even curses and other magical effects
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 207

6.description: (Revised): Receive two blood points for each point drained

6.description: As Silence of Death , except you can designate certain people to be able to make sound
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 206

6.name: Taste of Death
6.description: ( Revised ): Spit acidic blood at a target
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 140
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 176
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 205

6.name: Thin Blood
6.description: Make a vampire unable to heal their wounds with vitae

7.name: [7] Baal's Bloody Talons
7.description: As Baal's Caress , and it deals even more damage Blood of the Cobra : Use any Quietus power by spitting on the target Dam the Heart's River : Take control of a target's blood point expenditure Foul Blood : Poison the blood of a target so that only you can feed from them Hinder the Cainite Vitae : Make a target unable to spend blood points Leech : Drain blood from a target through skin contact Poison the Well of Life : Make a mortal's blood dangerous to drink by anyone except you

8.name: [8] Blood Awakening
8.description: Communicate with blood in one's system, either receiving insight from a mortal's memories or causing a Cainite to become confused and disoriented Blood Clot : Cause a victim's blood to clot, becoming unusable Blood Curse : Make it harder for a vampire to heal wounds, unable to spend blood points in other ways Blood of Destruction : Make the blood in one's body incredibly acidic Songs of Distant Vitae : Force difficult flashbacks on a target of their victims' experiences
